args.command:
set -eu
cd /workspace
printf '__DEMO_READY__\n'
IFS= read -r action
[ "$action" = publish ]

purpose: Hold the primary workspace open behind the publication gate
Inspect the shared storefront entry point
Inspect this agent's unclaimed line in the shared feature registry
Inspect the shared commerce boundary
Inspect the browser shell that consumes the shared registry
Introduce a deliberately incomplete implementation on this agent's registry line

args.command: node --input-type=module --eval 'import { readFile } from '"'"'node:fs/promises'"'"'; const source = await readFile('"'"'src/registry.js'"'"', '"'"'utf8'"'"'); const line = source.split('"'"'\n'"'"').find(function (value) { return value.trimStart().startsWith('"'"'A10:'"'"'); }); if (!line || !line.includes("verify() { return true; }")) { console.error("A10 target settles after repair"); console.error("A10 implementation should report verified"); process.exit(1); } console.log("A10 target settles after repair");'

purpose: Prove the registry contract fails before repair
Inspect the failed line before applying the smallest repair
Repair this agent's implementation in the shared registry

args.command: node --check src/registry.js

purpose: Syntax-check the repaired shared registry

args.command: node --input-type=module --eval 'import { readFile } from '"'"'node:fs/promises'"'"'; const source = await readFile('"'"'src/registry.js'"'"', '"'"'utf8'"'"'); const line = source.split('"'"'\n'"'"').find(function (value) { return value.trimStart().startsWith('"'"'A10:'"'"'); }); if (!line || !line.includes("verify() { return true; }")) { console.error("A10 target settles after repair"); console.error("A10 implementation should report verified"); process.exit(1); } console.log("A10 target settles after repair");'

purpose: Prove the original red contract turns green
Add deterministic fixture metadata to this agent's registry line

args.command: node --check src/registry.js

purpose: Syntax-check the registry after the data edit
Inspect the deterministic fixture metadata

args.command: node --input-type=module --eval 'import { readFile } from '"'"'node:fs/promises'"'"'; const source = await readFile('"'"'src/registry.js'"'"', '"'"'utf8'"'"'); const line = source.split('"'"'\n'"'"').find(function (value) { return value.trimStart().startsWith('"'"'A10:'"'"'); }); if (!line || !line.includes("fixture: '"'"'qa-fixture'"'"'")) { console.error("A10 fixture is deterministic"); console.error("A10 shared registry is missing data evidence"); process.exit(1); } console.log("A10 fixture is deterministic");'

purpose: Verify the deterministic fixture contract
Add this domain's semantic view metadata to the shared registry

args.command: node --check src/registry.js

purpose: Syntax-check the registry after the view edit
Inspect the semantic view metadata

args.command: node --input-type=module --eval 'import { readFile } from '"'"'node:fs/promises'"'"'; const source = await readFile('"'"'src/registry.js'"'"', '"'"'utf8'"'"'); const line = source.split('"'"'\n'"'"').find(function (value) { return value.trimStart().startsWith('"'"'A10:'"'"'); }); if (!line || !line.includes("data-domain=\"qa\"")) { console.error("A10 view has a semantic section"); console.error("A10 shared registry is missing view evidence"); process.exit(1); } console.log("A10 view has a semantic section");'

purpose: Verify the semantic view contract
Add visible-focus metadata to this agent's shared line
Inspect the entry point's unified presentation and focus layer

args.command: node --input-type=module --eval 'import { readFile } from '"'"'node:fs/promises'"'"'; const source = await readFile('"'"'src/registry.js'"'"', '"'"'utf8'"'"'); const line = source.split('"'"'\n'"'"').find(function (value) { return value.trimStart().startsWith('"'"'A10:'"'"'); }); if (!line || !line.includes("focusVisible: true")) { console.error("A10 style keeps focus visible"); console.error("A10 shared registry is missing style evidence"); process.exit(1); } console.log("A10 style keeps focus visible");'

purpose: Verify this contribution preserves visible focus
Add keyboard and reduced-motion metadata to the shared registry

args.command: node --check src/registry.js

purpose: Syntax-check the accessibility contribution
Inspect keyboard and reduced-motion metadata

args.command: node --input-type=module --eval 'import { readFile } from '"'"'node:fs/promises'"'"'; const source = await readFile('"'"'src/registry.js'"'"', '"'"'utf8'"'"'); const line = source.split('"'"'\n'"'"').find(function (value) { return value.trimStart().startsWith('"'"'A10:'"'"'); }); if (!line || !line.includes("reducedMotion: true")) { console.error("A10 honors reduced motion"); console.error("A10 shared registry is missing a11y evidence"); process.exit(1); } console.log("A10 honors reduced motion");'

purpose: Verify the reduced-motion contract
Add durable ownership metadata to this agent's registry line
Inspect the durable ownership metadata

args.command: node --input-type=module --eval 'import { readFile } from '"'"'node:fs/promises'"'"'; const source = await readFile('"'"'src/registry.js'"'"', '"'"'utf8'"'"'); const line = source.split('"'"'\n'"'"').find(function (value) { return value.trimStart().startsWith('"'"'A10:'"'"'); }); if (!line || !line.includes("owner: '"'"'A10'"'"'")) { console.error("A10 manifest names its owner"); console.error("A10 shared registry is missing manifest evidence"); process.exit(1); } console.log("A10 manifest names its owner");'

purpose: Verify the line names its durable owner
Review the compact shared storefront entry point
Review shared commerce configuration before publication
Review the browser shell that composes all contributions
Review the inline responsive style layer
Review this agent's full contribution in shared context
Reconfirm the conflict-sensitive configuration head

args.command: node --check src/registry.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/app.js

purpose: Syntax-check every shared JavaScript surface
Inspect ownership evidence before the integration checks
Add this agent's verification to the one shared test module

args.command: node --input-type=module --eval 'import { readFile } from '"'"'node:fs/promises'"'"'; const [index, app, registry, tests] = await Promise.all(['"'"'index.html'"'"', '"'"'src/app.js'"'"', '"'"'src/registry.js'"'"', '"'"'tests/storefront.test.mjs'"'"'].map(function (path) { return readFile(path, '"'"'utf8'"'"'); })); const line = registry.split('"'"'\n'"'"').find(function (value) { return value.trimStart().startsWith('"'"'A10:'"'"'); }); if (!index.includes('"'"'./src/registry.js'"'"') || !app.includes('"'"'FlashCart.features'"'"') || !line || !line.includes('"'"'schemaVersion: 1'"'"') || !tests.includes('"'"'A10 Integration QA contribution is ready'"'"')) process.exit(1); console.log('"'"'A10 shared application contract verified'"'"');'

purpose: Verify the shared application and collaborative test contract
Inspect the line immediately before its ready transition

args.command: node --check src/registry.js

purpose: Recheck the collaborative registry before finalization
Mark this agent's line ready for the coordinated publication

args.command: node --input-type=module --eval 'import { readFile } from '"'"'node:fs/promises'"'"'; const source = await readFile('"'"'src/registry.js'"'"', '"'"'utf8'"'"'); const line = source.split('"'"'\n'"'"').find(function (value) { return value.trimStart().startsWith('"'"'A10:'"'"'); }); if (!line || !line.includes("status: '"'"'ready'"'"'")) { console.error("A10 implementation is marked ready"); console.error("A10 shared registry is missing quality evidence"); process.exit(1); } console.log("A10 implementation is marked ready");'

purpose: Prove this contribution is publication-ready
Release the gated workspace only after every primary feature gate is green

args.command:
set -eu
cd /workspace
printf '__DEMO_READY__\n'
IFS= read -r action
[ "$action" = publish ]

purpose: Open a fresh post-merge A10 regression workspace
Read the fully merged feature registry from the fresh final workspace

args.command: node --check src/app.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/registry.js && node --check tests/storefront.test.mjs

purpose: Syntax-check the final storefront and collaborative test module

args.command: node --input-type=module --eval 'import { readFile, readdir } from '"'"'node:fs/promises'"'"'; const root = (await readdir('"'"'.'"'"')).sort(); const src = (await readdir('"'"'src'"'"')).sort(); const testsDir = (await readdir('"'"'tests'"'"')).sort(); const [index, app, config, registry, tests] = await Promise.all(['"'"'index.html'"'"', '"'"'src/app.js'"'"', '"'"'src/config.js'"'"', '"'"'src/registry.js'"'"', '"'"'tests/storefront.test.mjs'"'"'].map(function (path) { return readFile(path, '"'"'utf8'"'"'); })); const ready = (registry.match(/status: '"'"'ready'"'"'/g) || []).length; const contributions = (tests.match(/contribution is ready/g) || []).length; if (root.join('"'"','"'"') !== '"'"'index.html,src,tests'"'"' || src.join('"'"','"'"') !== '"'"'app.js,config.js,registry.js'"'"' || testsDir.join('"'"','"'"') !== '"'"'storefront.test.mjs'"'"' || ready !== 10 || contributions !== 10 || !config.includes("checkoutRetry: '"'"'complete'"'"'") || !tests.includes("checkoutRetry: '"'"'complete'"'"'") || !index.includes('"'"'./src/app.js'"'"') || !index.includes('"'"':focus-visible'"'"') || !app.includes('"'"'product-grid'"'"')) process.exit(1); globalThis.window = globalThis; globalThis.eval(config); globalThis.eval(registry); const quote = globalThis.FlashCart.features.A06.quoteCart(1000); if (quote.shippingCents !== 650 || quote.taxCents !== 75 || quote.totalCents !== 1725) process.exit(1); console.log('"'"'Shared storefront final regression passed'"'"');'

purpose: Run the frozen exact-inventory final regression from a fresh post-merge workspace
Read the retained storefront shell after final regression

args.command: node --input-type=module --eval 'import { createReadStream, statSync } from '"'"'node:fs'"'"'; import { createServer } from '"'"'node:http'"'"'; import { extname, resolve, sep } from '"'"'node:path'"'"'; const root = resolve(process.cwd()); const types = { '"'"'.css'"'"': '"'"'text/css; charset=utf-8'"'"', '"'"'.html'"'"': '"'"'text/html; charset=utf-8'"'"', '"'"'.js'"'"': '"'"'application/javascript; charset=utf-8'"'"' }; const server = createServer(function (request, response) { const pathname = decodeURIComponent(new URL(request.url, '"'"'http://flashcart.local'"'"').pathname); const file = resolve(root, pathname === '"'"'/'"'"' ? '"'"'index.html'"'"' : '"'"'.'"'"' + pathname); if (!file.startsWith(root + sep) && file !== root) return response.writeHead(403).end('"'"'forbidden'"'"'); try { if (!statSync(file).isFile()) throw new Error('"'"'not file'"'"'); response.writeHead(200, { '"'"'Content-Type'"'"': types[extname(file)] || '"'"'application/octet-stream'"'"', '"'"'Cache-Control'"'"': '"'"'no-store'"'"' }); createReadStream(file).pipe(response); } catch { response.writeHead(404).end('"'"'not found'"'"'); } }); process.stdin.setEncoding('"'"'utf8'"'"'); process.stdin.on('"'"'data'"'"', function (value) { if (value.trim() === '"'"'stop'"'"') server.close(function () { process.exit(0); }); }); server.listen(4173, '"'"'0.0.0.0'"'"', function () { console.log('"'"'FLASHCART_READY 0.0.0.0:4173'"'"'); });'

purpose: Start the final offline storefront for a retained trusted-preview capture
Read the final preview readiness marker before the trusted host probe
Stop the retained preview before closing the final workspace
Close the clean final regression workspace with an explicit no-op publication
